name: YouTrack MCP
what_it_does: YouTrack MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with JetBrains YouTrack — querying and creating issues, managing sprints and agile boards, updating issue state and assignments, searching with YouTrack's query language, and integrating project management workflows into agent-driven development. YouTrack is JetBrains' issue tracker used by development teams alongside their IDEs.
use_cases: Creating and updating YouTrack issues from development workflow agents
Querying issue status and sprint progress from project monitoring agents
Managing agile sprints and backlog from project management agents
Searching YouTrack with query language from information retrieval agents
Automating issue triage and assignment from DevOps agents
Generating project status reports from YouTrack data from reporting agents
not_for: Teams not using YouTrack (use Jira, Linear, or GitHub Issues MCPs for other trackers)
Real-time notification systems (YouTrack webhooks are better for event-driven scenarios)
best_when: A JetBrains-heavy development team using YouTrack needs AI-assisted issue management — querying issues, creating bugs, and managing sprints through an agent workflow.
avoid_when: You use Jira, Linear, Asana, or other project management tools — use the appropriate MCP for your actual tracker.

auth.notes: YouTrack permanent token (API key) required. Generate from YouTrack profile: Profile → Account Security → Tokens. Set YOUTRACK_URL and YOUTRACK_TOKEN environment variables.

pricing.free_tier_limits: YouTrack Cloud: free for up to 10 users; YouTrack InCloud for larger teams
pricing.paid_tiers: YouTrack Cloud: $3.67/user/month; YouTrack Standalone license for self-hosted
pricing.notes: YouTrack has a free tier for small teams (up to 10 users). MCP server is free open source from devstroop. JetBrains subscription may be required for enterprise features.

performance.rate_limits: YouTrack REST API rate limits apply; generally generous

known_agent_gotchas: YouTrack's query language is powerful but complex — test queries manually before agent use
Self-hosted YouTrack URL varies by installation — ensure correct URL configuration
YouTrack API uses custom ID formats for issues — understand project-specific issue IDs
Community MCP from devstroop — good quality but not official JetBrains MCP
Agile boards and sprints have specific API endpoints — may require additional configuration
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API token auth. YouTrack instances may be self-hosted or cloud. Project data is sensitive — scope token to minimum required permissions. Keep token secure.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API token. YouTrack project data may be confidential. Not official JetBrains MCP. Scope token permissions. Self-hosted instances require additional network security.
